---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Sora:wght@400;600;700&family=Exo+2:ital,wght@1,800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"/>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>

<style>
* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
* { user-select: none; -webkit-user-select: none; }
input, textarea { user-select: text; -webkit-user-select: text; }
.anchorjs-link, .anchor-section, .heading-anchor { display: none !important; }

body, .quarto-container, #quarto-content, main {
  background: #13151a !important;
  color: #e2e4e9 !important;
  font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif !important;
}

/* Push content to very top — remove all Quarto top offsets */
#quarto-content, #quarto-document-content, .quarto-container,
main.content.column-page, main, .page-columns, .page-rows-contents {
  padding-top: 0 !important;
  margin-top: 0 !important;
}
#title-block-header.quarto-title-block {
  display: none !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  padding: 0 !important;
}

/* ── Shared layout ── */
.page-section {
  max-width: 960px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 5rem 1.5rem;
}
.page-section.wide {
  max-width: 1100px;
}
.section-label {
  font-size: .7em;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: .14em;
  color: #F97316;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
.section-label-light {
  font-size: .7em;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: .14em;
  color: #8b8fa8;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}
h2, .page-section h2, .hero h2, section h2 {
  font-size: 1.9em !important;
  font-weight: 600 !important;
  color: #e2e4e9 !important;
  line-height: 1.25 !important;
  margin-bottom: 1rem !important;
  font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif !important;
  border-bottom: none !important;
  border: none !important;
  padding-bottom: 0 !important;
}
.section-sub {
  color: #8b8fa8;
  font-size: .88em;
  line-height: 1.7;
  max-width: 620px;
}
.divider { border: none; border-top: 1px solid #1e2026; }

/* ── Hero ── */
.hero {
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 !important;
  min-height: auto !important;
  max-width: none !important;
  margin: 0 !important;
  grid-template-columns: none !important;
}
.hero-inner {
  max-width: 960px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 3rem 1.5rem 5rem;
}
.hero-h1 {
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 4.5vw, 3rem);
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #e2e4e9;
  line-height: 1.2;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  max-width: 700px;
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .site-header { height: 72px !important; }
  .site-header img.logo { height: 56px !important; }
  .site-header .header-bg { top: 0 !important; }
  .hero-inner { padding: 2rem 1.25rem 3rem !important; }
}
.hero p {
  font-size: .95em;
  color: #8b8fa8;
  line-height: 1.75;
  max-width: 560px;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.hero-actions { display: flex; gap: 1rem; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.btn-primary {
  background: #F97316;
  color: #0e1013;
  font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif;
  font-size: .82em;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: .65rem 1.4rem;
  border-radius: 5px;
  text-decoration: none;
  letter-spacing: .03em;
}
.btn-primary:hover { background: #fb923c; color: #0e1013; text-decoration: none; }
.btn-ghost {
  color: #8b8fa8;
  font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif;
  font-size: .82em;
  padding: .65rem 0;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.btn-ghost:hover { color: #e2e4e9; text-decoration: none; }

/* ── Problem ── */
.problem-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 3rem;
  margin-top: 3rem;
  align-items: start;
}
@media (max-width: 700px) { .problem-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
.problem-stat {
  font-size: clamp(3rem, 7vw, 4.5rem);
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #F97316;
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: .4rem;
}
.problem-stat-label {
  font-size: .8em;
  color: #8b8fa8;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.problem-points { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; }
.problem-point-title {
  font-size: .85em;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #e2e4e9;
  margin-bottom: .3rem;
}
.problem-point-body {
  font-size: .82em;
  color: #8b8fa8;
  line-height: 1.65;
}

/* ── Methodology ── */
.method-steps {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 2rem;
  margin-top: 2.5rem;
}
@media (max-width: 700px) { .method-steps { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
.method-step {
  border-left: 2px solid #2e3140;
  padding-left: 1.2rem;
}
.method-step-num {
  font-size: .72em;
  color: #F97316;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: .1em;
  margin-bottom: .5rem;
}
.method-step h3 {
  font-size: .88em;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #e2e4e9;
  margin-bottom: .4rem;
}
.method-step p {
  font-size: .8em;
  color: #8b8fa8;
  line-height: 1.65;
}

/* ── Demo split ── */
.demo-split {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 1rem;
  height: 500px;
  margin-top: 2rem;
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .demo-split {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    height: auto;
  }
  .demo-map-wrap { height: 280px; }
  /* Remove scroll trap — let the page scroll naturally on mobile */
  .demo-terminal-wrap { height: auto; }
  .terminal-output { overflow-y: visible; height: auto; min-height: 120px; }
}

/* Terminal panel */
.demo-terminal-wrap {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  background: #0e1013;
  border: 1px solid #2e3140;
  border-radius: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
  min-height: 0;
}
.terminal-chrome {
  background: #1a1c22;
  padding: .5rem .9rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .6rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #2e3140;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.t-dot { width: 11px; height: 11px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; }
.t-dot-r { background: #ff5f57; }
.t-dot-y { background: #febc2e; }
.t-dot-g { background: #28c840; }
.chrome-title { color: #8b8fa8; font-size: .8em; margin-left: .4rem; }
.chrome-brand { color: #F97316; }
.terminal-output {
  flex: 1;
  overflow-y: auto;
  overflow-x: auto;
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  padding: .9rem 1.1rem .4rem;
  font-size: .8em;
  line-height: 1.65;
  min-height: 0;
}
.terminal-output::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 4px; }
.terminal-output::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: transparent; }
.terminal-output::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #2e3140; border-radius: 2px; }
.t-out-line { white-space: pre; color: #e2e4e9; }
.terminal-input-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: .4rem 1.1rem .7rem;
  gap: .5rem;
  border-top: 1px solid #1e2026;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.t-prompt-sym { color: #F97316; font-size: .8em; user-select: none; }
#cmd-input {
  flex: 1;
  background: transparent;
  border: none;
  outline: none;
  color: #e2e4e9;
  font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif;
  font-size: .8em;
  caret-color: #F97316;
}
#cmd-input::placeholder { color: #3a3d4a; }
.demo-hint {
  font-size: .73em;
  color: #3a3d4a;
  margin-top: .6rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
}
.demo-hint span { color: #8b8fa8; }

/* Map panel */
.demo-map-wrap {
  border: 1px solid #2e3140;
  border-radius: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #0e1013;
  position: relative;
}
#demo-map { height: 100%; width: 100%; background: #0e1013; }
.map-placeholder {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  color: #3a3d4a;
  font-size: .78em;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 500;
  transition: opacity .3s;
}

/* Route table — !important to override Bootstrap/Quarto theme defaults */
.terminal-output table,
.terminal-output thead,
.terminal-output tbody,
.terminal-output tr,
.terminal-output th,
.terminal-output td { background: transparent !important; background-color: transparent !important; border-color: transparent !important; }
.route-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 1em; margin: .4rem 0; }
.route-table th {
  color: #8b8fa8; font-weight: 400; padding: .12rem .5rem;
  text-align: left; border-bottom: 1px solid #2e3140 !important;
}
.route-table td { padding: .22rem .5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e2026 !important; color: #e2e4e9; }
.route-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none !important; }
.td-rank  { color: #F97316 !important; text-align: center; }
.td-muted { color: #8b8fa8 !important; text-align: right; }

/* Leaflet overrides */
.leaflet-container { background: #13151a !important; }
.leaflet-control-zoom a { background:#1a1c22 !important; color:#e2e4e9 !important; border-color:#2e3140 !important; }
.leaflet-control-attribution { background:rgba(14,16,19,.85) !important; color:#8b8fa8 !important; }
.leaflet-control-attribution a { color:#8b8fa8 !important; }
.leaflet-control-attribution svg { display: none !important; }
.info.legend {
  background:rgba(26,28,34,.95) !important; color:#e2e4e9 !important;
  border:1px solid #2e3140; border-radius:6px; padding:.5rem .8rem;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:.76em;
}
@keyframes hs-pulse { 0%,100%{stroke-opacity:.85} 50%{stroke-opacity:.15} }
@keyframes hs-glow  { 0%,100%{stroke-opacity:.18} 50%{stroke-opacity:.04} }
.hs-core { animation: hs-pulse 2.4s ease-in-out infinite; }
.hs-halo { animation: hs-glow  2.4s ease-in-out infinite; }

/* ── Safety Audit ── */
.audit-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 420px 1fr;
  gap: 3rem;
  margin-top: 2.5rem;
  align-items: start;
}
@media (max-width: 800px) { .audit-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

.pdf-viewer {
  border: 1px solid #2e3140;
  border-radius: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #0e1013;
}
.pdf-viewer-chrome {
  background: #1a1c22;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #2e3140;
  padding: .5rem .9rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .5rem;
}
.pdf-viewer-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: #2e3140; }
.pdf-viewer-title { font-size: .73em; color: #8b8fa8; margin-left: .4rem; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }

.audit-report { padding: 1.4rem 1.6rem; font-size: .8em; max-height: 480px; overflow-y: auto; overflow-x: auto; }
.audit-report-inner { min-width: 520px; }
.audit-report-header { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #1e2026; padding-bottom: .8rem; }
.audit-wordmark img { height: 28px; display: block; }
.audit-title-block { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.audit-report-title { color: #e2e4e9; font-size: .95em; }
.audit-report-period { color: #8b8fa8; font-size: .82em; }

.audit-client-strip { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .25rem; }
.audit-client-name { color: #e2e4e9; font-weight: 600; }
.audit-client-period { color: #8b8fa8; }

.audit-score-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.audit-big-score { font-size: 2.4em; font-weight: 600; color: #e2e4e9; }
.audit-big-score span { font-size: .45em; color: #8b8fa8; }
.audit-grade-badge { background: #14532d; color: #34d399; padding: .15rem .55rem; border-radius: 3px; font-size: .8em; }
.audit-trend { color: #34d399; font-size: .82em; }
.audit-score-label { color: #8b8fa8; font-size: .82em; }

.audit-kpis { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr); gap: .5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; overflow: hidden; }
.audit-kpi-num { font-size: 1.2em; font-weight: 600; color: #e2e4e9; }
.audit-kpi-label { font-size: .76em; color: #8b8fa8; }

.audit-factor-section-label { font-size: .72em; letter-spacing: .1em; color: #8b8fa8; margin-bottom: .5rem; }
.audit-factors { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem; }
.audit-factor-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .6rem; }
.audit-factor-label { width: 120px; font-size: .8em; color: #e2e4e9; flex-shrink: 0; }
.audit-factor-bar { flex: 1; height: 4px; background: #1e2026; border-radius: 2px; overflow: hidden; }
.audit-factor-bar div { height: 100%; border-radius: 2px; }
.audit-factor-score { font-size: .8em; color: #8b8fa8; width: 24px; text-align: right; }

.audit-certified { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; border-top: 1px solid #1e2026; padding-top: .7rem; }
.audit-certified-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem; color: #8b8fa8; font-size: .76em; }
.audit-certified-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #34d399; }
.audit-page-num { color: #8b8fa8; font-size: .76em; }

.audit-props { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.8rem; }
.audit-prop { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1rem 1fr; column-gap: .6rem; }
.audit-prop-icon { color: #F97316; font-size: .6em; padding-top: .18em; }
.audit-prop h3 { font-size: .88em; font-weight: 600; color: #e2e4e9; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: .3rem; }
.audit-prop p { font-size: .8em; color: #8b8fa8; line-height: 1.65; }

/* ── Example ── */
.example-split { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.1fr 1fr; gap: 2rem; margin-top: 2rem; align-items: start; }
@media (max-width: 700px) { .example-split { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
@media (max-width: 860px) { #example [style*="repeat(3,1fr)"] { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr !important; } }
@media (max-width: 560px) { #example [style*="repeat(3,1fr)"] { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; } }
.example-map-wrap { background: #0c0e12; border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #1e2026; }
.example-map-wrap svg { width: 100%; display: block; }
.route-cards { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; }
.ex-route-card { background: #0e1013; border: 1px solid #1e2026; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1.2rem 1.4rem; }
.ex-route-card.best { border-color: #22C55E55; }
.ex-badge { display: inline-block; font-size: .67em; font-weight: 600; padding: .15em .55em; border-radius: 3px; margin-bottom: .55rem; letter-spacing: .05em; }
.ex-badge.rec    { background: #14532d; color: #34d399; }
.ex-badge.fast   { background: #1c2a3a; color: #60a5fa; }
.ex-badge.alt    { background: #1e2026; color: #8b8fa8; }
.ex-route-name { font-size: .88em; font-weight: 600; color: #e2e4e9; margin-bottom: .75rem; }
.ex-stats { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: .4rem .75rem; }
.ex-stat { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .12rem; }
.ex-stat-label { font-size: .65em; color: #5a5f72; letter-spacing: .05em; text-transform: uppercase; }
.ex-stat-value { font-size: .82em; font-weight: 500; color: #e2e4e9; }
.ex-stat-value.good { color: #22C55E; }
.ex-stat-value.warn { color: #F97316; }
.ex-stat-value.muted { color: #8b8fa8; }
.ex-hotspots { margin-top: .8rem; padding-top: .8rem; border-top: 1px solid #1a1d24; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .35rem; }
.ex-hs { font-size: .72em; color: #8b8fa8; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .4rem; }
.ex-hs-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #ff2d55; flex-shrink: 0; }

/* ── Docs ── */
.docs-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 2.5rem;
  margin-top: 2.5rem;
  align-items: start;
}
@media (max-width: 700px) { .docs-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
@media (max-width: 600px) { #example .page-section > div[style*="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr"] { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; } }
.code-block {
  background: #0e1013;
  border: 1px solid #2e3140;
  border-radius: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.code-chrome {
  background: #1a1c22;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #2e3140;
  padding: .45rem .9rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .5rem;
}
.code-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: #2e3140; }
.code-label { font-size: .75em; color: #8b8fa8; margin-left: .4rem; }
.code-tabs { display: flex; gap: 0; margin-left: .6rem; }
.code-tab {
  background: transparent;
  border: none;
  border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;
  color: #8b8fa8;
  font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif;
  font-size: .75em;
  padding: .2rem .7rem;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: color .15s, border-color .15s;
}
.code-tab:hover { color: #e2e4e9; }
.code-tab.active { color: #F97316; border-bottom-color: #F97316; }
.code-body { padding: 1.1rem 1.2rem; font-size: .78em; line-height: 1.7; color: #e2e4e9; overflow-x: auto; }
.c-kw { color: #F97316; }
.c-str { color: #34d399; }
.c-cm { color: #8b8fa8; font-style: italic; }
.c-key { color: #06B6D4; }

.docs-fields { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.1rem; }
.docs-field { display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; gap: .5rem 1rem; align-items: baseline; }
.docs-field-name { font-size: .8em; color: #F97316; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; }
.docs-field-type { font-size: .72em; color: #8b8fa8; grid-column: 1; }
.docs-field-desc { font-size: .8em; color: #8b8fa8; line-height: 1.6; grid-row: 1 / 3; grid-column: 2; }

/* ── CTA ── */
.cta-section {
  background: transparent;
}
.cta-inner {
  max-width: 560px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 5rem 1.5rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  text-align: center;
  gap: 1.5rem;
}
.cta-inner h2 { font-size: 1.9em; margin-bottom: .4rem; }
.cta-inner > p { color: #8b8fa8; font-size: .95em; }
.cta-actions { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .4rem; width: 100%; }
.waitlist-form { display: flex; gap: .5rem; align-items: center; width: 100%; }
.waitlist-input {
  background: #1a1d24;
  border: 1px solid #2e3140;
  border-radius: 6px;
  color: #e2e4e9;
  font-size: .85em;
  padding: .55rem 1rem;
  flex: 1;
  outline: none;
  transition: border-color .15s;
}
.waitlist-input:focus { border-color: #F97316; }
.waitlist-input::placeholder { color: #5a5f72; }
.waitlist-thanks { color: #22C55E; font-size: .85em; }

/* ── Header image hover ── */
.site-header .header-bg {
  filter: grayscale(1) brightness(0.28);
  transition: filter 0.5s ease;
}
.site-header:hover .header-bg {
  filter: grayscale(0) brightness(1);
}

/* ── Sticky nav ── */
#sticky-nav {
  position: fixed;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  z-index: 200;
  height: 60px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0 1.5rem;
  background: rgba(19, 21, 26, 0.92);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  border-bottom: 1px solid #1e2026;
  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
  transform: translateY(-8px);
  transition: opacity 0.25s ease, transform 0.25s ease;
}
#sticky-nav.visible {
  opacity: 1;
  pointer-events: auto;
  transform: translateY(0);
}
#sticky-nav img { display: block; }
main.content.column-page { border: none !important; box-shadow: none !important; }
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .waitlist-form { flex-direction: column; align-items: stretch; width: 100%; }
  .waitlist-input { width: 100% !important; }
  .cta-actions { width: 100%; }
  #sticky-nav { display: none; }
}
</style>

<!-- ── Sticky nav ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div id="sticky-nav">
  <img src="logo-composite4.svg" alt="llano" style="height:40px;display:block;">
</div>
<script>
(function() {
  var nav = document.getElementById('sticky-nav');
  var header = document.querySelector('.site-header');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
    var threshold = header ? header.offsetHeight : 160;
    nav.classList.toggle('visible', window.scrollY > threshold);
  }, { passive: true });
})();
</script>

<!-- ── Header ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="site-header" style="width:100vw;position:relative;left:50%;right:50%;margin-left:-50vw;margin-right:-50vw;height:220px;overflow:hidden;background:#13151a;">
  <img class="header-bg" src="darkheader.svg" style="position:absolute;width:calc(100% + 24px);height:auto;top:-60px;left:-12px;display:block;">
  <div style="position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:80px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent,#13151a);z-index:2;pointer-events:none;"></div>
  <div style="position:relative;z-index:3;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;padding-left:1.5rem;">
    <img class="logo" src="logo-composite4.svg" alt="llano" style="height:130px;display:block;">
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── Hero ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section class="hero" style="border-top:none;min-height:auto;">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-h1">Know the Risk<br>Before You Route</div>
    <p>Llano is route safety scoring for trucking fleets. Real crash history, live weather, and road geometry — ranked alternatives in a single API call.</p>
    <div class="hero-actions">
      <a class="btn-primary" href="#demo">Try the Demo</a>
      <a class="btn-ghost" href="#waitlist-form">Get Free Access</a>
      <a class="btn-ghost" href="#docs">API Docs</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<hr class="divider"/>

<!-- ── Problem ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section id="problem">
  <div class="page-section">
    <div class="section-label">THE PROBLEM</div>
    <h2>Route Choice Is the Blind Spot</h2>
    <div class="problem-grid">
      <div>
        <div class="problem-stat">700+</div>
        <div class="problem-stat-label">Texans killed in commercial truck crashes in 2023. Texas leads the nation — every year.<br><span style="font-size:.8em;opacity:.6">Source: TXDOT Crash Statistics</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="problem-points">
        <div>
          <div class="problem-point-title">The industry monitors drivers. Not routes.</div>
          <div class="problem-point-body">Dashcams, ELD compliance, driver scoring — fleets have invested heavily in safety technology. But the route itself goes unscored. Two roads between the same cities can carry crash rates that differ by 3× or more depending on geometry, traffic, and time of day.</div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="problem-point-title">Conditions change between dispatch and delivery.</div>
          <div class="problem-point-body">A route that looked fine at 6 AM looks different at noon in a thunderstorm. Real-time weather, congestion, and departure time all shift crash probability on specific segments — and none of that is visible to a dispatcher today.</div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="problem-point-title">When something goes wrong, the record matters.</div>
          <div class="problem-point-body">Fleets that dispatched safely and can prove it — with scored alternatives, logged conditions, and a documented choice — are in a fundamentally different position than those that can't. The paper trail is a byproduct of doing the right thing.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<hr class="divider"/>

<!-- ── Methodology ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section id="methodology">
  <div class="page-section">
    <div class="section-label">HOW IT WORKS</div>
    <h2>From Route to Risk Score</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">A statistical model fit to years of TXDOT crash records, adjusted in real time for weather and departure time.</p>
    <div class="method-steps">
      <div class="method-step">
        <div class="method-step-num">01 — BASELINE</div>
        <h3>Crash rate per segment</h3>
        <p>A mixed-effects negative binomial model estimates expected crashes per vehicle-mile on every road segment in Texas — controlling for road class, curvature, grade, traffic volume, and urban density.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="method-step">
        <div class="method-step-num">02 — DYNAMIC</div>
        <h3>Real-time multiplier</h3>
        <p>An XGBoost case-crossover model estimates how current conditions (wind, precipitation, congestion) elevate crash probability relative to the same segment on a clear, free-flow traffic day.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="method-step">
        <div class="method-step-num">03 — OUTPUT</div>
        <h3>Trips per crash, ranked</h3>
        <p>Alternatives are scored and ranked by expected trips between crashes. The safest route is returned first, with hotspot locations and a weather multiplier for each alternative.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<hr class="divider"/>

<!-- ── Example ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section id="example">
  <div class="page-section">
    <div class="section-label">EXAMPLE</div>
    <h2>Laredo → Dallas</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">Three alternatives scored and ranked by safety. The faster route carries meaningfully higher risk — a trade-off Llano surfaces before dispatch.</p>

    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.1rem;margin-top:2rem;">

      <!-- Route 1 — SH-130 Toll: safest, +10 min → RECOMMENDED -->
      <div class="ex-route-card best">
        <span class="ex-badge rec">★ RECOMMENDED</span>
        <div class="ex-route-name" style="color:#22C55E">SH-130 Toll around Austin</div>
        <div class="ex-stats">
          <div class="ex-stat">
            <div class="ex-stat-label">Drive Time</div>
            <div class="ex-stat-value">6h 29m <span style="color:#8b8fa8;font-size:.85em">+10m</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="ex-stat">
            <div class="ex-stat-label">Relative Risk</div>
            <div class="ex-stat-value good">0.62×</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ex-stat">
            <div class="ex-stat-label">Safety Score</div>
            <div class="ex-stat-value good">1 in 487 trips</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ex-stat">
            <div class="ex-stat-label">Dynamic Mult</div>
            <div class="ex-stat-value muted">1.01×</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ex-hotspots">
          <div class="ex-hs"><span class="ex-hs-dot"></span>18% mark — I-10 merge</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Route 2 — I-35 N: fastest → RR baseline 1.0× -->
      <div class="ex-route-card">
        <span class="ex-badge fast">⚡ FASTEST</span>
        <div class="ex-route-name" style="color:#F97316">I-35 N through Austin</div>
        <div class="ex-stats">
          <div class="ex-stat">
            <div class="ex-stat-label">Drive Time</div>
            <div class="ex-stat-value">6h 19m</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ex-stat">
            <div class="ex-stat-label">Relative Risk</div>
            <div class="ex-stat-value muted">1.0×</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ex-stat">
            <div class="ex-stat-label">Safety Score</div>
            <div class="ex-stat-value">1 in 303 trips</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ex-stat">
            <div class="ex-stat-label">Dynamic Mult</div>
            <div class="ex-stat-value muted">1.05×</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ex-hotspots">
          <div class="ex-hs"><span class="ex-hs-dot"></span>44% mark — Austin construction</div>
          <div class="ex-hs"><span class="ex-hs-dot"></span>61% mark — urban interchange</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Route 3 — US-281 N: slower and barely riskier -->
      <div class="ex-route-card">
        <span class="ex-badge alt">ALTERNATIVE</span>
        <div class="ex-route-name" style="color:#06B6D4">US-281 N rural cutoff</div>
        <div class="ex-stats">
          <div class="ex-stat">
            <div class="ex-stat-label">Drive Time</div>
            <div class="ex-stat-value">6h 53m <span style="color:#8b8fa8;font-size:.85em">+34m</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="ex-stat">
            <div class="ex-stat-label">Relative Risk</div>
            <div class="ex-stat-value warn">1.11×</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ex-stat">
            <div class="ex-stat-label">Safety Score</div>
            <div class="ex-stat-value warn">1 in 272 trips</div>
          </div>
          <div class="ex-stat">
            <div class="ex-stat-label">Dynamic Mult</div>
            <div class="ex-stat-value muted">1.03×</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ex-hotspots">
          <div class="ex-hs"><span class="ex-hs-dot"></span>22% mark — rural two-lane</div>
          <div class="ex-hs"><span class="ex-hs-dot"></span>71% mark — night visibility</div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
    <p style="font-size:.7em;color:#5a5f72;margin-top:.75rem;">Snapshot values. Risk scores update continuously as weather, traffic, and incident conditions change.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<hr class="divider"/>

<!-- ── Demo ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section id="demo">
  <div class="page-section wide">
    <div class="section-label">LIVE DEMO</div>
    <h2>Try It — Texas Routes</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">Type a <code style="color:#e2e4e9;background:#1a1c22;padding:.1em .4em;border-radius:3px">llano score</code> command below. Geocoding and routing are live.</p>

    <div class="demo-split">

      <!-- Terminal -->
      <div class="demo-terminal-wrap">
        <div class="terminal-chrome">
          <div class="t-dot t-dot-r"></div>
          <div class="t-dot t-dot-y"></div>
          <div class="t-dot t-dot-g"></div>
          <span class="chrome-title"><span class="chrome-brand">|:|</span> llano</span>
        </div>
        <div class="terminal-output" id="term-output"></div>
        <div class="terminal-input-row">
          <span class="t-prompt-sym">$</span>
          <div style="position:relative;flex:1;display:flex;align-items:center;">
            <span id="cmd-ghost" style="position:absolute;left:0;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:#3a3d4a;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:.8em;pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;width:100%">llano score --from "San Antonio" --to "Round Rock, TX"</span>
            <input id="cmd-input" type="text" autocomplete="off" spellcheck="false" style="background:transparent;position:relative;z-index:1;"/>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="mobile-suggestion" style="display:none;padding:.45rem .6rem .1rem;">
          <button onclick="acceptSuggestion()" style="background:#1a1d24;border:1px solid #2e3140;border-radius:4px;color:#3a3d4a;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:.72em;padding:.35rem .7rem;cursor:pointer;text-align:left;width:100%;">llano score --from "San Antonio" --to "Round Rock, TX" <span style="color:#5a5f72;float:right;">tap to try →</span></button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Map (always visible) -->
      <div class="demo-map-wrap">
        <div id="demo-map"></div>
        <div class="map-placeholder" id="map-placeholder">enter a route to see it mapped</div>
      </div>

    </div>

    <div class="demo-hint">
      Flags: &nbsp;<span>--from</span> &nbsp;<span>--to</span> &nbsp;<span>--via</span>
      &nbsp;<span>--arrive "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM"</span> &nbsp;<span>--depart "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM"</span>
      &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span>→</span> to accept suggestion &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span>⇥</span> to reset
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<hr class="divider"/>

<!-- ── Safety Audit ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section id="audit">
  <div class="page-section wide">
    <div class="section-label">SAFETY AUDIT</div>
    <h2>Built for the Broker</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">Auto-generated quarterly reports your fleet can hand directly to underwriters — third-party scored, not self-reported.</p>
    <p class="section-sub" style="margin-top:.5rem;">The median nuclear verdict in a trucking case now exceeds $22M — up from under $1M two decades ago. Fleets that can demonstrate a documented, data-driven safety process are in a fundamentally different position when it matters most.</p>
    <div class="audit-grid">

      <div class="pdf-viewer">
        <div class="pdf-viewer-chrome">
          <div class="pdf-viewer-dot"></div>
          <div class="pdf-viewer-dot"></div>
          <div class="pdf-viewer-dot"></div>
          <span class="pdf-viewer-title">acme-logistics-safety-audit-q1-2026.pdf</span>
        </div>
        <div class="audit-report">
          <div class="audit-report-inner">
          <div class="audit-report-header">
            <div class="audit-wordmark"><img src="logo-composite4.svg" alt="llano"></div>
            <div class="audit-title-block">
              <span class="audit-report-title">Fleet Safety Audit Report</span>
              <span class="audit-report-period">Q1 2026 · January 1 – March 31</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="audit-client-strip">
            <span class="audit-client-name">Acme Logistics Inc.</span>
            <span class="audit-client-period">Generated April 2, 2026</span>
          </div>
          <div class="audit-score-row">
            <div class="audit-big-score">71<span>/100</span></div>
            <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.3rem">
              <span class="audit-grade-badge">Good</span>
              <span class="audit-trend">↑ +4 pts vs Q4 2025</span>
            </div>
            <span class="audit-score-label" style="margin-left:auto;align-self:flex-end">Overall Safety Score</span>
          </div>
          <div class="audit-kpis">
            <div class="audit-kpi"><div class="audit-kpi-num">4,821</div><div class="audit-kpi-label">Routes Scored</div></div>
            <div class="audit-kpi"><div class="audit-kpi-num">87%</div><div class="audit-kpi-label">Compliance Rate</div></div>
            <div class="audit-kpi"><div class="audit-kpi-num">2.1M</div><div class="audit-kpi-label">Miles Covered</div></div>
          </div>
          <div class="audit-factor-section-label">FACTOR BREAKDOWN</div>
          <div class="audit-factors">
            <div class="audit-factor-row">
              <span class="audit-factor-label">Weather Exposure</span>
              <div class="audit-factor-bar"><div style="width:74%;background:#1a6b47"></div></div>
              <span class="audit-factor-score">74</span>
            </div>
            <div class="audit-factor-row">
              <span class="audit-factor-label">Road Quality</span>
              <div class="audit-factor-bar"><div style="width:81%;background:#1a6b47"></div></div>
              <span class="audit-factor-score">81</span>
            </div>
            <div class="audit-factor-row">
              <span class="audit-factor-label">Traffic</span>
              <div class="audit-factor-bar"><div style="width:58%;background:#b45309"></div></div>
              <span class="audit-factor-score">58</span>
            </div>
            <div class="audit-factor-row">
              <span class="audit-factor-label">Incident History</span>
              <div class="audit-factor-bar"><div style="width:79%;background:#1a6b47"></div></div>
              <span class="audit-factor-score">79</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="audit-certified">
            <div class="audit-certified-left">
              <div class="audit-certified-dot"></div>
              <span>Certified by Llano · Third-party scored · Not self-reported</span>
            </div>
            <span class="audit-page-num">p. 1 of 8</span>
          </div>
          </div><!-- audit-report-inner -->
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="audit-props">
        <div class="audit-prop"><span class="audit-prop-icon">📋</span><div><h3>Insurer-Ready Format</h3><p>Third-party certified scores and methodology summaries designed to satisfy underwriter requirements — not self-reported safety claims.</p></div></div>
        <div class="audit-prop"><span class="audit-prop-icon">📈</span><div><h3>Trend Over Time</h3><p>Quarterly safety score history and period-over-period improvement give insurers the longitudinal data they need to price risk accurately.</p></div></div>
        <div class="audit-prop"><span class="audit-prop-icon">✅</span><div><h3>Compliance Tracking</h3><p>Track how often dispatchers act on Llano recommendations. Demonstrated safety culture is more credible than any self-reported metric.</p></div></div>
        <div class="audit-prop"><span class="audit-prop-icon">📍</span><div><h3>Hotspot Attribution</h3><p>Recurring risk concentrations mapped across your full route network — with incident correlation that builds actuarial credibility over time.</p></div></div>
        <div class="audit-prop"><span class="audit-prop-icon">⚖️</span><div><h3>Auditable for Litigation</h3><p>Every routing decision is timestamped, scored, and logged at dispatch. If an incident leads to litigation, you can show exactly what safety data was available, what alternatives were considered, and what choice was made — and why it was reasonable.</p></div></div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<hr class="divider"/>

<!-- ── Docs ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section id="docs">
  <div class="page-section">
    <div class="section-label">API</div>
    <h2>Bring Your Own Router</h2>
    <p class="section-sub">Built around how fleet operations actually work — dispatch approves a load, the route is set, and no one has time to export geometry. Llano fits into that moment: a single API call returns a risk score before the driver rolls, with no changes to your TMS or existing workflow.</p>
    <div class="docs-grid">
      <div class="code-block">
        <div class="code-chrome">
          <div class="code-dot"></div><div class="code-dot"></div><div class="code-dot"></div>
          <div class="code-tabs">
            <button class="code-tab active" onclick="docsTab('curl',this)">cURL</button>
            <button class="code-tab" onclick="docsTab('python',this)">Python</button>
            <button class="code-tab" onclick="docsTab('r',this)">R</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <pre class="code-body" id="docs-pane-curl"><code><span class="c-cm"># Option A — pass your router key, Llano calls it on your behalf</span>
<span class="c-fn">curl</span> -s -X POST https://api.llano.io/score \
  -H <span class="c-str">"X-API-Key: llno_..."</span> \
  -H <span class="c-str">"Content-Type: application/json"</span> \
  -d <span class="c-str">'{
    "waypoints":    [[-99.5075, 27.5035], [-98.4936, 29.4241]],
    "arrive":       "2026-04-20T18:00",
    "alternatives": 3,
    "router": { "provider": "tomtom", "api_key": "YOUR_KEY" }
  }'</span>

<span class="c-cm"># Option B — pass raw GeoJSON from your existing pipeline</span>
<span class="c-fn">curl</span> -s -X POST https://api.llano.io/score \
  -H <span class="c-str">"X-API-Key: llno_..."</span> \
  -H <span class="c-str">"Content-Type: application/json"</span> \
  -d <span class="c-str">'{
    "route":  { "type": "LineString", "coordinates": [...] },
    "arrive": "2026-04-20T18:00"
  }'</span>

<span class="c-cm"># Option C — no router, Llano plans and scores alternatives</span>
<span class="c-fn">curl</span> -s -X POST https://api.llano.io/score \
  -H <span class="c-str">"X-API-Key: llno_..."</span> \
  -H <span class="c-str">"Content-Type: application/json"</span> \
  -d <span class="c-str">'{
    "waypoints":    [[-99.5075, 27.5035], [-98.4936, 29.4241]],
    "arrive":       "2026-04-20T18:00",
    "alternatives": 3
  }'</span></code></pre>

        <pre class="code-body" id="docs-pane-python" style="display:none"><code><span class="c-kw">import</span> requests

<span class="c-cm"># Option A — pass your router key, Llano calls it on your behalf</span>
resp = requests.<span class="c-fn">post</span>(
    <span class="c-str">"https://api.llano.io/score"</span>,
    headers={<span class="c-str">"X-API-Key"</span>: <span class="c-str">"llno_..."</span>},
    json={
        <span class="c-str">"waypoints"</span>:    [[-99.5075, 27.5035], [-98.4936, 29.4241]],
        <span class="c-str">"arrive"</span>:       <span class="c-str">"2026-04-20T18:00"</span>,
        <span class="c-str">"alternatives"</span>: 3,
        <span class="c-str">"router"</span>: {
            <span class="c-str">"provider"</span>: <span class="c-str">"tomtom"</span>,  <span class="c-cm"># "tomtom" | "pcmiler" | "here"</span>
            <span class="c-str">"api_key"</span>:  <span class="c-str">"YOUR_TOMTOM_KEY"</span>
        }
    }
)

<span class="c-cm"># Option B — pass raw GeoJSON from your existing pipeline</span>
resp = requests.<span class="c-fn">post</span>(
    <span class="c-str">"https://api.llano.io/score"</span>,
    headers={<span class="c-str">"X-API-Key"</span>: <span class="c-str">"llno_..."</span>},
    json={<span class="c-str">"route"</span>: your_linestring_geojson,
          <span class="c-str">"arrive"</span>: <span class="c-str">"2026-04-20T18:00"</span>}
)

routes = resp.<span class="c-fn">json</span>()   <span class="c-cm"># sorted safest first</span>
best   = routes[0]

<span class="c-fn">print</span>(<span class="c-str">f"</span>{best[<span class="c-str">'name'</span>]}<span class="c-str">"</span>)
<span class="c-fn">print</span>(<span class="c-str">f"1 in </span>{best[<span class="c-str">'trips_per_crash'</span>]:,}<span class="c-str"> trips"</span>)
<span class="c-fn">print</span>(<span class="c-str">f"dynamic mult: </span>{best[<span class="c-str">'dynamic_mult'</span>]}<span class="c-str">"</span>)</code></pre>

        <pre class="code-body" id="docs-pane-r" style="display:none"><code><span class="c-kw">library</span>(httr2)

<span class="c-cm"># Option A — pass your router key, Llano calls it on your behalf</span>
resp <span class="c-kw">&lt;-</span> <span class="c-fn">request</span>(<span class="c-str">"https://api.llano.io/score"</span>) |>
  <span class="c-fn">req_headers</span>(<span class="c-str">"X-API-Key"</span> = <span class="c-str">"llno_..."</span>) |>
  <span class="c-fn">req_body_json</span>(<span class="c-fn">list</span>(
    waypoints    = <span class="c-fn">list</span>(<span class="c-fn">c</span>(-99.5075, 27.5035), <span class="c-fn">c</span>(-98.4936, 29.4241)),
    arrive       = <span class="c-str">"2026-04-20T18:00"</span>,
    alternatives = 3L,
    router       = <span class="c-fn">list</span>(provider = <span class="c-str">"tomtom"</span>,  <span class="c-cm"># "tomtom" | "pcmiler" | "here"</span>
                        api_key  = <span class="c-str">"YOUR_TOMTOM_KEY"</span>)
  )) |>
  <span class="c-fn">req_perform</span>() |>
  <span class="c-fn">resp_body_json</span>()

<span class="c-cm"># Option B — pass raw GeoJSON from your existing pipeline</span>
resp <span class="c-kw">&lt;-</span> <span class="c-fn">request</span>(<span class="c-str">"https://api.llano.io/score"</span>) |>
  <span class="c-fn">req_headers</span>(<span class="c-str">"X-API-Key"</span> = <span class="c-str">"llno_..."</span>) |>
  <span class="c-fn">req_body_json</span>(<span class="c-fn">list</span>(route  = your_linestring_geojson,
                     arrive = <span class="c-str">"2026-04-20T18:00"</span>)) |>
  <span class="c-fn">req_perform</span>() |>
  <span class="c-fn">resp_body_json</span>()

best <span class="c-kw">&lt;-</span> resp[[1]]   <span class="c-cm"># sorted safest first</span>

<span class="c-fn">cat</span>(best$name, <span class="c-str">"\n"</span>)
<span class="c-fn">cat</span>(<span class="c-str">"1 in"</span>, <span class="c-fn">format</span>(best$trips_per_crash, big.mark=<span class="c-str">","</span>), <span class="c-str">"trips\n"</span>)
<span class="c-fn">cat</span>(<span class="c-str">"dynamic mult:"</span>, best$dynamic_mult, <span class="c-str">"\n"</span>)</code></pre>
      </div>

      <div class="docs-fields">
        <div style="font-size:.78em;color:#F97316;margin-bottom:1rem;letter-spacing:.06em">ROUTER AGNOSTIC</div>
        <div style="font-size:.82em;color:#8b8fa8;line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:1.5rem">
          Pass your PC*Miler, TomTom, or HERE API key and we'll call your router on your behalf. Or send raw coordinates, or let Llano route from scratch. The scored response is identical either way.
        </div>
        <div style="font-size:.78em;color:#8b8fa8;margin-bottom:.75rem;letter-spacing:.06em">RESPONSE FIELDS</div>
        <div class="docs-field">
          <span class="docs-field-name">trips_per_crash</span>
          <span class="docs-field-type">number</span>
          <span class="docs-field-desc">Expected trips between crashes on this route at this time. Higher is safer. Ranked descending.</span>
        </div>
        <div class="docs-field">
          <span class="docs-field-name">dynamic_mult</span>
          <span class="docs-field-type">number</span>
          <span class="docs-field-desc">Dynamic multiplier on crash probability. 1.0 = clear baseline. Values above 1.0 indicate elevated risk from current conditions.</span>
        </div>
        <div class="docs-field">
          <span class="docs-field-name">hotspots</span>
          <span class="docs-field-type">array</span>
          <span class="docs-field-desc">High-risk segments along the route — each with a route fraction (0–1) and contributing factors.</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<hr class="divider"/>

<!-- ── CTA ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
<section class="cta-section" id="about">
  <div class="cta-inner">
    <div>
      <h2>Ready to score your routes?</h2>
      <p>Llano is in early access. Texas coverage available today.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="cta-actions">
      <div class="waitlist-form" id="waitlist-form">
        <input class="waitlist-input" id="waitlist-email" type="email" placeholder="your@email.com" autocomplete="email" autocorrect="off" autocapitalize="off" spellcheck="false"/>
        <button class="btn-primary" onclick="submitWaitlist()" style="cursor:pointer;border:none;white-space:nowrap;">Get Free Access</button>
      </div>
      <span style="font-size:.72em;color:#5a5f72;">We'll send a magic link — no password needed</span>
      <span class="waitlist-thanks" id="waitlist-thanks" style="display:none;">Check your email ✓</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<p style="text-align:center;font-size:0.72em;color:#8b8fa8;max-width:640px;margin:1.5rem auto 0;padding:0 1rem;">
  Llano provides probabilistic risk scores based on historical crash data and real-time conditions. Scores are statistical estimates and do not guarantee safe passage. Always exercise independent judgment. Not a substitute for professional safety consultation.
</p>

<script>
(function () {

// ── Config ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var API_URL  = "https://api.llano.io/score";
var DEMO_KEY = "lno_d2c3ef2868d60aa08b9ef41ef8017cc9e4765529c027d07e";
var COLORS   = ["#F97316","#06B6D4","#22C55E","#EAB308","#A855F7"];
var TX_BBOX  = { minLat: 25.8, maxLat: 36.5, minLon: -106.6, maxLon: -93.5 };

// ── State ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var history = [];
var histIdx = -1;
var leafMap        = null;
var hotspotControl = null;

// ── DOM ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var output      = document.getElementById("term-output");
var input       = document.getElementById("cmd-input");
var placeholder = document.getElementById("map-placeholder");
var ghost       = document.getElementById("cmd-ghost");
var SUGGESTION  = 'llano score --from "San Antonio" --to "Round Rock, TX"';

function updateGhost() {
  if (ghost && !isMobile) ghost.style.display = input.value === "" ? "block" : "none";
  if (mobileSuggestion && isMobile) mobileSuggestion.style.display = input.value === "" ? "block" : "none";
}

// ── Map init (always visible, Texas overview) ─────────────────────────────────
function initMap() {
  leafMap = L.map("demo-map", { zoomControl: true, scrollWheelZoom: false });
  L.tileLayer("https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png", {
    attribution: '\u00a9 <a href="https://openstreetmap.org">OSM</a> \u00a9 <a href="https://carto.com">CARTO</a>',
    subdomains: "abcd", maxZoom: 19
  }).addTo(leafMap);
  leafMap.setView([31.0, -99.5], 5);
}

// ── Output helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function line(text, cls) {
  var el = document.createElement("div");
  el.className = "t-out-line" + (cls ? " " + cls : "");
  el.textContent = text;
  output.appendChild(el);
  output.scrollTop = output.scrollHeight;
  return el;
}
function blank() { line(""); }
function lineHTML(html) {
  var el = document.createElement("div");
  el.className = "t-out-line";
  el.innerHTML = html;
  output.appendChild(el);
  output.scrollTop = output.scrollHeight;
  return el;
}

// ── Welcome ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function welcome() {
  var o = '#F97316', m = '#8b8fa8', b = '#2e3140';
  var dot = '<span style="color:' + o + ';font-weight:700">\u25cf</span>';
  function c(html) { lineHTML(html).style.textAlign = 'center'; }
  output.style.justifyContent = 'center';
  blank();
  c('<span style="color:' + b + '">|</span>             <span style="color:' + b + '">|</span>');
  c('<span style="color:' + b + '">|</span>      ' + dot + '      <span style="color:' + b + '">|</span>');
  c('<span style="color:' + b + '">|</span>             <span style="color:' + b + '">|</span>');
  c('<span style="color:' + b + '">|</span>      ' + dot + '      <span style="color:' + b + '">|</span>');
  c('<span style="color:' + b + '">|</span>             <span style="color:' + b + '">|</span>');
  c('<span style="color:' + m + '">route intelligence</span>');
  blank();
}

// ── Spinner ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function spinner(msg) {
  var OFFSETS = ["-0.35em","-0.18em","0em","0.18em","0.35em","0.18em","0em","-0.18em"];
  var fi = 2;  // start and rest at center (0em = standard |:|)
  function frame(f) {
    return '<span style="color:#3a3d4a">|</span>' +
           '<span style="color:#F97316;font-weight:700;display:inline-block;transform:translateY(' + OFFSETS[f] + ')">:</span>' +
           '<span style="color:#3a3d4a">|</span>';
  }
  var el = lineHTML(frame(fi) + '  <span style="color:#8b8fa8">' + msg + "</span>");
  var tid = setInterval(function () {
    fi = (fi + 1) % OFFSETS.length;
    el.innerHTML = frame(fi) + '  <span style="color:#8b8fa8">' + msg + "</span>";
  }, 120);

  function stop(done, callback) {
    clearInterval(tid);
    var delays = [150, 210, 290, 390, 510];
    var step = 0;
    function slowTick() {
      if (step >= delays.length) {
        el.innerHTML = frame(2) + '  <span style="color:#8b8fa8">' + (done || msg) + "</span>";
        if (callback) requestAnimationFrame(function() { setTimeout(callback, 180); });
        return;
      }
      fi = (fi + 1) % OFFSETS.length;
      el.innerHTML = frame(fi) + '  <span style="color:#8b8fa8">' + msg + "</span>";
      setTimeout(slowTick, delays[step++]);
    }
    slowTick();
  }
  stop.update = function(newMsg) { msg = newMsg; };
  return stop;
}

// ── Flag parser ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function parseFlags(cmd) {
  cmd = cmd.replace(/^\s*llano\s+score\s*/, "");
  var flags = { via: [] };
  var re = /--(\w+)\s+(?:"([^"]*)"|(\S+))/g;
  var m;
  while ((m = re.exec(cmd)) !== null) {
    var key = m[1], val = m[2] !== undefined ? m[2] : m[3];
    if (key === "via") flags.via.push(val); else flags[key] = val;
  }
  return flags;
}

// ── Geocode ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function geocode(address) {
  return fetch(
    "https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?q=" + encodeURIComponent(address) +
    "&format=json&limit=1&countrycodes=us,mx",
    { headers: { "Accept": "application/json", "User-Agent": "llano-demo/1.0" } }
  ).then(function(r) { return r.json(); })
   .then(function(data) {
     if (!data.length) throw new Error("Could not geocode: " + address);
     var lon = parseFloat(data[0].lon), lat = parseFloat(data[0].lat);
     if (lat < TX_BBOX.minLat || lat > TX_BBOX.maxLat ||
         lon < TX_BBOX.minLon || lon > TX_BBOX.maxLon)
       throw new Error("Address outside Texas: " + address);
     return [lon, lat];
   });
}

// ── Formatting ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function fmtDur(secs) {
  secs = parseInt(secs, 10);
  var h = Math.floor(secs / 3600), m = Math.floor((secs % 3600) / 60);
  return h > 0 ? h + "h " + String(m).padStart(2,"0") + "m" : m + "m";
}
function fmtNum(n) { return parseInt(n, 10).toLocaleString(); }
function scalar(v) { return Array.isArray(v) ? v[0] : v; }
function fmtDateTime(d) {
  var yr = d.getFullYear();
  var mo = String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0");
  var dy = String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,"0");
  var hr = String(d.getHours()).padStart(2,"0");
  var mn = String(d.getMinutes()).padStart(2,"0");
  return yr + "-" + mo + "-" + dy + " " + hr + ":" + mn;
}
function parseTS(str) {
  // accept "YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM" or ISO
  return str ? new Date(str.replace(" ","T")) : null;
}

// ── Render results ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderResults(routes, flags) {
  var ranked = routes.slice().sort(function(a, b) {
    return (scalar(b.trips_per_crash)||0) - (scalar(a.trips_per_crash)||0);
  });
  var durVals = ranked.map(function(r) { return scalar(r.duration)||scalar(r.duration_secs)||0; });
  var fastestDur = Math.min.apply(null, durVals);
  var fastestTpc = scalar(ranked[durVals.indexOf(fastestDur)].trips_per_crash) || 0;

  // Resolve base timestamp — explicit depart/arrive or default to now as depart
  var anchorTS   = parseTS(flags.depart || flags.arrive) || new Date();
  var hasArrive  = !!flags.arrive;
  var hasDepart  = !!flags.depart;
  var timeColHdr = hasArrive ? "Depart" : "Arrive";
  var showTimeCol = true;  // always show — default depart = now

  blank();
  var fromTo = (flags.from||"") + "  \u2192  " + (flags.to||"");
  var tsLabel = hasDepart ? "  depart " + flags.depart
              : hasArrive ? "  arrive " + flags.arrive
              : "  depart " + fmtDateTime(anchorTS);
  lineHTML('<span style="color:#8b8fa8">' + fromTo + "  " + tsLabel + "</span>");
  blank();

  var tbl = document.createElement("table");
  tbl.className = "route-table";
  var thead = tbl.createTHead(), hrow = thead.insertRow();
  ["","Route","Time","+Time",timeColHdr,"Relative Risk","Safety"].forEach(function(h) {
    var th = document.createElement("th"); th.textContent = h; hrow.appendChild(th);
  });
  var tbody = tbl.createTBody();
  ranked.forEach(function(r, i) {
    var tpc  = scalar(r.trips_per_crash) || 0;
    var dur  = scalar(r.duration) || scalar(r.duration_secs) || 0;
    var lbl  = scalar(r.name) || scalar(r.label) || ("Route " + (i+1));
    var extra = dur - fastestDur;
    var isBest = i === 0;
    var isFastest = (dur === fastestDur);
    var rr = (tpc > 0 && fastestTpc > 0)
      ? (fastestTpc / tpc).toFixed(2) + "\u00d7"
      : "\u2014";
    if (isFastest) rr = "1.0\u00d7";
    // Compute per-route arrive or depart time
    var routeTimeMS = dur * 1000;
    var routeDate = hasArrive
      ? new Date(anchorTS.getTime() - routeTimeMS)   // arrive fixed → compute depart
      : new Date(anchorTS.getTime() + routeTimeMS);  // depart fixed (or now) → compute arrive
    var routeTimeStr = fmtDateTime(routeDate);
    var row = tbody.insertRow();
    row.style.opacity = isBest ? "1" : "0.7";
    [
      { text: isBest ? "\u2605" : String(i+1), cls: "td-rank" },
      { text: lbl, color: COLORS[i % COLORS.length] },
      { text: fmtDur(dur) },
      { text: extra > 0 ? "+" + fmtDur(extra) : "", cls: "td-muted" },
      { text: routeTimeStr, cls: "td-muted" },
      { text: rr, cls: "td-muted" },
      { text: tpc > 0 ? "1 in " + fmtNum(tpc) + " trips" : "\u2014" }
    ].forEach(function(c) {
      var td = document.createElement("td");
      td.textContent = c.text;
      if (c.cls)   td.className = c.cls;
      if (c.color) td.style.color = c.color;
      row.appendChild(td);
    });
  });
  var wrap = document.createElement("div");
  wrap.className = "t-out-line";
  wrap.appendChild(tbl);
  output.appendChild(wrap);
  output.scrollTop = output.scrollHeight;
  blank();

  renderMap(ranked);

  // On mobile, map is above the terminal — scroll it into view after render
  if (isMobile) {
    setTimeout(function() {
      document.getElementById("demo-map").scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "start" });
    }, 150);
  }
}

// ── Map update (no layout shift — map is always visible) ──────────────────────
function extractCoords(coordinates) {
  if (!coordinates || !coordinates.length) return { lngs: [], lats: [] };
  if (Array.isArray(coordinates[0]) && typeof coordinates[0][0] === "number")
    return { lngs: coordinates.map(function(p) { return p[0]; }),
             lats: coordinates.map(function(p) { return p[1]; }) };
  return { lngs: [], lats: [] };
}

function routeSubseg(lngs, lats, frac, half) {
  half = half || 0.015;
  var n = lngs.length;
  if (n < 2) return { lngs: lngs, lats: lats };
  var cumD = [0];
  for (var i = 1; i < n; i++) {
    var dx = lngs[i]-lngs[i-1], dy = lats[i]-lats[i-1];
    cumD.push(cumD[i-1] + Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy));
  }
  var total = cumD[n-1];
  var lo = Math.max(0,(frac-half)*total), hi = Math.min(total,(frac+half)*total);
  var rl = [], ra = [];
  for (var j = 0; j < n; j++)
    if (cumD[j] >= lo && cumD[j] <= hi) { rl.push(lngs[j]); ra.push(lats[j]); }
  if (!rl.length) {
    var best = 0, bestD = Infinity;
    for (var k = 0; k < n; k++) {
      var d = Math.abs(cumD[k]/total - frac);
      if (d < bestD) { bestD = d; best = k; }
    }
    rl = [lngs[best]]; ra = [lats[best]];
  }
  return { lngs: rl, lats: ra };
}

function renderMap(ranked) {
  // Hide placeholder
  if (placeholder) placeholder.style.opacity = "0";

  // Clear existing layers (keep the tile layer)
  leafMap.eachLayer(function(layer) {
    if (!(layer instanceof L.TileLayer)) leafMap.removeLayer(layer);
  });

  var allLngs = [], allLats = [];

  for (var i = ranked.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    var r = ranked[i];
    if (!r.route || !r.route.coordinates) continue;
    var xy = extractCoords(r.route.coordinates);
    if (!xy.lngs.length) continue;
    var latlngs = xy.lats.map(function(lat, j) { return [lat, xy.lngs[j]]; });
    var color = COLORS[i % COLORS.length];
    var lbl = scalar(r.name) || scalar(r.label) || ("Route " + (i+1));
    var tpc = scalar(r.trips_per_crash) || 0;
    var dur = scalar(r.duration) || scalar(r.duration_secs) || 0;

    L.polyline(latlngs, { color: color, weight: i === 0 ? 5 : 3.5, opacity: i === 0 ? 0.9 : 0.5 })
      .bindPopup("<b style='color:" + color + "'>" + lbl + "</b><br>1 in " + fmtNum(tpc) + " trips<br>" + fmtDur(dur))
      .addTo(leafMap);

    allLngs = allLngs.concat(xy.lngs);
    allLats = allLats.concat(xy.lats);
  }

  // Hotspots — layer group, off by default
  var best = ranked[0];
  var hotspotLayer = L.layerGroup();
  if (best && best.route && best.route.coordinates && best.hotspots) {
    var bxy = extractCoords(best.route.coordinates);
    best.hotspots.forEach(function(hs) {
      var frac = parseFloat(hs.route_fraction) || 0;
      var seg = routeSubseg(bxy.lngs, bxy.lats, frac, 0.015);
      if (!seg.lngs.length) return;
      var ll = seg.lats.map(function(lat, j) { return [lat, seg.lngs[j]]; });
      L.polyline(ll, { color:"#e11d48", weight:18, opacity:0.18 }).addTo(hotspotLayer);
      L.polyline(ll, { color:"#ff2d55", weight:3,  opacity:0.9  })
        .bindTooltip("Hotspot — " + (frac*100).toFixed(1) + "% of route").addTo(hotspotLayer);
    });
  }

  if (hotspotControl) { hotspotControl.remove(); hotspotControl = null; }
  hotspotControl = L.control.layers(null, { "Hotspots": hotspotLayer }, { position: "topright", collapsed: false });
  hotspotControl.addTo(leafMap);

  // Waypoint markers
  if (best && best.waypoints) {
    var labels = "ABCDEFGHIJ";
    var n = best.waypoints.length;
    best.waypoints.forEach(function(wp, j) {
      var isEnd = (j === 0 || j === n - 1);
      var icon = L.divIcon({
        className: "",
        html: '<div style="width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:' +
              (isEnd ? '#F97316' : '#8b8fa8') +
              ';display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;' +
              'color:#0f1117;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;font-family:monospace;' +
              'box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.5);">' +
              (labels[j] || String(j+1)) + '</div>',
        iconSize: [20, 20],
        iconAnchor: [10, 10]
      });
      L.marker([wp[1], wp[0]], { icon: icon }).addTo(leafMap);
    });
  }

  if (allLngs.length) {
    var bounds = [
      [Math.min.apply(null,allLats), Math.min.apply(null,allLngs)],
      [Math.max.apply(null,allLats), Math.max.apply(null,allLngs)]
    ];
    setTimeout(function() {
      leafMap.invalidateSize();
      leafMap.fitBounds(bounds, { padding: [40, 40], animate: true });
    }, 50);
  }
}

// ── Execute ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function execute(cmd) {
  cmd = cmd.trim();
  if (!cmd) return;

  output.innerHTML = "";
  lineHTML('<span style="color:#F97316">$</span> <span style="color:#e2e4e9">' + cmd.replace(/</g,"&lt;") + '</span>');

  if (cmd === "clear" || cmd === "llano clear") {
    output.innerHTML = "";
    input.value = "";
    updateGhost();
    if (placeholder) placeholder.style.opacity = "1";
    leafMap.eachLayer(function(layer) {
      if (!(layer instanceof L.TileLayer)) leafMap.removeLayer(layer);
    });
    leafMap.setView([31.0, -99.5], 5);
    welcome();
    return;
  }

  if (!cmd.startsWith("llano score")) {
    line("Unknown command. Try: llano score --from \"San Antonio, TX\" --to \"Round Rock, TX\"", "t-out-err");
    blank();
    return;
  }

  var flags = parseFlags(cmd);
  if (!flags.from) { line("Error: --from is required", "t-out-err"); blank(); return; }
  if (!flags.to)   { line("Error: --to is required",   "t-out-err"); blank(); return; }
  if (flags.depart && flags.arrive) {
    line("Error: --depart and --arrive are mutually exclusive", "t-out-err"); blank(); return;
  }

  var stop = spinner("Geocoding...");
  input.disabled = true;

  var addresses = [flags.from].concat(flags.via || []).concat([flags.to]);
  Promise.all(addresses.map(geocode))
    .then(function(coords) {
      stop.update("Routing and scoring...");
      return fetch(API_URL, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", "X-API-Key": DEMO_KEY },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          waypoints:    coords,
          timestamp:    flags.depart ? flags.depart.replace(" ","T") : null,
          arrive:       flags.arrive ? flags.arrive.replace(" ","T") : null,
          alternatives: parseInt(flags.alts || flags.alternatives || 2, 10),
          origin_label: addresses[0],
          dest_label:   addresses[addresses.length - 1]
        })
      }).then(function(r) {
        if (r.status === 429) throw new Error("Rate limit — try again in a moment");
        if (r.status === 401) throw new Error("Demo key invalid");
        if (!r.ok) throw new Error("API error " + r.status);
        return r.json();
      }).then(function(data) {
        var routes = Array.isArray(data) ? data : (data.routes || []);
        stop("Scored " + routes.length + " route" + (routes.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""), function() {
          renderResults(routes, flags);
        });
      });
    })
    .catch(function(err) {
      line("Error: " + err.message, "t-out-err");
      blank();
    })
    .finally(function() {
      input.disabled = false;
      input.focus();
    });
}

// ── Input ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
input.addEventListener("keydown", function(e) {
  if (e.key === "Enter") {
    output.style.justifyContent = '';
    var cmd = input.value;
    history.unshift(cmd);
    histIdx = -1;
    input.value = "";
    updateGhost();
    execute(cmd);
  } else if (e.key === "Tab") {
    e.preventDefault();
    output.innerHTML = "";
    input.value = "";
    updateGhost();
    if (placeholder) placeholder.style.opacity = "1";
    leafMap.eachLayer(function(layer) {
      if (!(layer instanceof L.TileLayer)) leafMap.removeLayer(layer);
    });
    leafMap.setView([31.0, -99.5], 5);
  } else if (e.key === "ArrowRight" && input.value === "") {
    e.preventDefault();
    input.value = SUGGESTION;
    updateGhost();
  } else if (e.key === "ArrowUp") {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (histIdx < history.length - 1) { histIdx++; input.value = history[histIdx]; }
    updateGhost();
  } else if (e.key === "ArrowDown") {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (histIdx > 0) { histIdx--; input.value = history[histIdx]; }
    else             { histIdx = -1; input.value = ""; }
    updateGhost();
  }
});
input.addEventListener("input", updateGhost);

// ── Docs tabs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
window.docsTab = function(lang, btn) {
  ["curl","python","r"].forEach(function(l) {
    var pane = document.getElementById("docs-pane-" + l);
    if (pane) pane.style.display = l === lang ? "block" : "none";
  });
  var tabs = btn.parentElement.querySelectorAll(".code-tab");
  tabs.forEach(function(t) { t.classList.remove("active"); });
  btn.classList.add("active");
};

// ── Init ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
var isMobile = window.innerWidth < 769;
var mobileSuggestion = document.getElementById("mobile-suggestion");
if (isMobile) {
  input.placeholder = 'llano score --from "..." --to "..."';
  if (ghost) ghost.style.display = "none";
  if (mobileSuggestion) mobileSuggestion.style.display = "block";
}

window.acceptSuggestion = function() {
  input.value = SUGGESTION;
  if (mobileSuggestion) mobileSuggestion.style.display = "none";
  input.focus();
};
welcome();
initMap();
updateGhost();
// Focus only when user scrolls to the demo section, not on page load

})();

// ── Waitlist ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function submitWaitlist() {
  var emailEl  = document.getElementById("waitlist-email");
  var formEl   = document.getElementById("waitlist-form");
  var thanksEl = document.getElementById("waitlist-thanks");
  var email    = emailEl ? emailEl.value.trim() : "";
  if (!email || !/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(email)) {
    if (emailEl) { emailEl.focus(); emailEl.style.borderColor = "#ef4444"; }
    return;
  }
  fetch("https://api.llano.io/auth/request", {
    method: "POST",
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    body: JSON.stringify({ email: email })
  }).catch(function() {});  // fail silently — show thanks regardless
  if (formEl)   formEl.style.display   = "none";
  if (thanksEl) thanksEl.style.display = "inline";
}
</script>
```
